beats.narration: An eddy current test leaves no trace on the part. When the probe lifts, the only evidence it ever happened is what you wrote down.

payload.title: THE RECORD IS THE PRODUCT
payload.sub: No film, no developed indication — just your report.

beats.narration: The standard of completeness is reproducibility. Another qualified technician, given your report, standard, and an equivalent instrument, must rebuild your test exactly.

payload.heading: Record enough to rebuild it
payload.note: INSTRUMENT · PROBE · CABLE · SETTINGS · REFERENCE STANDARD

beats.narration: Standardization proves sensitivity on the reference standard — and you re-verify it: at fixed intervals, four hours common, after any change, and at the end.
Fail a check, and everything tested since the last good one gets retested. You cannot know when the drift began.
Keep the chain unbroken — standard, log, settings, data, signed report. Disposition every indication. Correct with one line, never an eraser.

payload.sub: Standard → log → settings → data → signed report.
